calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for the Estate of Violet O'Donovan.

The Court stated that you have $1.7 million earning zero and why does that make sense. Mr. Bresler stated that it made sense at the time, that the cash flowed in between February and July of 2015, that the taxes kept getting pushed back, that when the final accounting was sent in they were looking forward and did not see with clarity. The Court stated that the jewelry was appraised for more than what was received. Mr. Bresler stated that they had a willing buyer and a willing seller, that he checked Craigslist and that it was not out line of prices. The Court stated that the probate referees have the same sources and that it has no idea who the staff person at the hair salon is. Mr. Bresler stated that they have another problem, that there is no entry for the stone and carving (headstone), that due to family circumstances they do not want this continued, that they want the court to agree today and that they will come back with an amended petition for the grave marker and that they understand the need for reduction. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Feb-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
